description:
You are a DevOps engineer who just received a trouble-ticket:  

“The micro-service is not emitting DEBUG logs to its new location.  
Please fix both the YAML and TOML configuration files and leave a short
verification log for the next shift.”

Your assignment takes place completely in the Linux terminal under the normal
user account ( /home/user ).

TARGET FILES & DIRECTORIES (already present):
1. /home/user/app_config/config.yaml  
2. /home/user/app_config/logging.toml  

DESIRED STATE (what you must create / modify):
A. /home/user/app_config/config.yaml  
   • The YAML key logging.level must be set to the string value DEBUG  
   • No other keys may be altered or removed.  

B. /home/user/app_config/logging.toml  
   • In table [output.console] the key level must be DEBUG (string).  
   • In table [output.file]  
       – enabled must be true (boolean, not string)  
       – path must be /home/user/app_logs/service_debug.log (string)  
       – level must be DEBUG (string)  
       – rotation must be size (string)  
       – size_limit_mb must be 50 (integer) — this key does not exist yet; add it.  
   • Append a new table [filters] containing a single key/value  
       ignore = ["healthcheck"]  

C. /home/user/debug_logs/verification.log (must be created by you)  
   • Plain text; exactly 7 lines; NO extra spaces; each line terminated by a LF.  
   • Required lines in exact order:  
     1. CONFIG_YAML_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG  
     2. TOML_FILE_OUTPUT_ENABLED=true  
     3. TOML_FILE_PATH=/home/user/app_logs/service_debug.log  
     4. TOML_FILE_LEVEL=DEBUG  
     5. TOML_FILE_ROTATION=size  
     6. TOML_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT_MB=50  
     7. FILTERS_IGNORE=healthcheck  

SUCCESS CRITERIA (automated tests will check):  
1. /home/user/app_config/config.yaml exists and contains logging.level: DEBUG.  
2. /home/user/app_config/logging.toml matches all requirements listed in B (key names, values, data types).  
3. /home/user/debug_logs/verification.log exists, is readable, and lines match section C exactly (case-sensitive).  

Remember:
• Work with normal user permissions only.  
• Do NOT hard-code absolute paths in commands inside the files; only the values listed above.  
• Preserve all other existing content in both configuration files.  
• Do not produce any additional output files.
truth:
# Initial files before the task starts
File: /home/user/app_config/config.yaml
---------------------------------------
server:
  host: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 8080

logging:
  level: "INFO"
  format: "json"

# After successful completion, /home/user/app_config/config.yaml must be:
---------------------------------------
server:
  host: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 8080

logging:
  level: "DEBUG"
  format: "json"

(EOF)

File: /home/user/app_config/logging.toml  (initial)
---------------------------------------
[output.console]
enabled = true
level = "INFO"

[output.file]
enabled = false
path = "/var/log/app/service.log"
level = "INFO"
rotation = "daily"

# After successful completion, /home/user/app_config/logging.toml must be:
---------------------------------------
[output.console]
enabled = true
level = "DEBUG"

[output.file]
enabled = true
path = "/home/user/app_logs/service_debug.log"
level = "DEBUG"
rotation = "size"
size_limit_mb = 50

[filters]
ignore = ["healthcheck"]

(EOF)

Directory that must be created by the agent:
    /home/user/debug_logs/   (permissions 755 or more lenient)

File that must be created by the agent:
    /home/user/debug_logs/verification.log
Expected exact content (7 lines, each ending with LF):
CONFIG_YAML_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG
TOML_FILE_OUTPUT_ENABLED=true
TOML_FILE_PATH=/home/user/app_logs/service_debug.log
TOML_FILE_LEVEL=DEBUG
TOML_FILE_ROTATION=size
TOML_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT_MB=50
FILTERS_IGNORE=healthcheck

No other files or directories will be inspected by the grader.
